text.title: Gemini Function Calling Failure Modes
text.summary: Five recurring antipatterns with symptom / root-cause / fix.

antipattern.symptom: Function called with hallucinated args; side-effects executed; no audit trail.
antipattern.root-cause: Auto-mode skips the callback layer where validation lives.
antipattern.fix: Switch to manual mode + arg validator (rule r3).

antipattern.symptom: Model picks the wrong tool ~30% of the time.
Schema parse fails or model emits wrong shape.
antipattern.root-cause: SDK schema generator handles only the basic cases reliably.
antipattern.fix: Flatten to ≤2 levels (rule r2); pass complex blobs by reference id.

antipattern.symptom: Per-query cost doubles unexpectedly; bill spike.
antipattern.fix: Enable per-call only when needed; gate on search_grounding flag.

antipattern.symptom: Tool runs with bad types; runtime exception leaks to user.
antipattern.fix: jsonschema / pydantic validation before execute (rule r4).
